metadata.title: Global Agentic OS Dashboard
metadata.sourcePolicy: Local folder mode. Refreshed by ./agentic-os from PROJECT-PATHS.md, local git, task memory/todo/session files, and existing dashboard status. No external dashboards queried.

summary.overallStatus: RunSmart iOS v1.0 build 6 is in App Store review context and should stay frozen. Resumely iOS cleared analytics and UX/export gates on June 1, so the next constraint is an authenticated real-device smoke plus App Store Connect upload. RunSmart Web and ResumeBuilder Web are support repos and need dirty-tree triage before more implementation.
summary.bestNextAction: Resumely iOS: run the authenticated device smoke from tasks/session-log.md, verify PostHog/export coverage, then upload screenshots/listing and submit. RunSmart iOS: monitor Apple review and do not mutate v1.0 release artifacts.
mainBlockers: RunSmart iOS: Apple review outcome is external; v1.0 artifacts should remain frozen.
Resumely iOS: no local Fastlane config / ASC API key, or manual portal upload is needed.
Resumely iOS: real-device authenticated smoke has not been run after the June 1 fixes.
RunSmart Web: dirty local tree with many modified/untracked files before more voice work.
ResumeBuilder Web: rollout plan remains unchecked on a dirty PDF parse branch.
Dirty local repo state: RunSmart iOS, Resumely iOS, RunSmart Web, Agentic OS, ResumeBuilder AI (Web).
Dirty local repo state: RunSmart iOS, Resumely iOS, RunSmart Web, ResumeBuilder AI (Web).
needsDecision: RunSmart 1.0.1: wait for v1.0 review outcome, then choose the smallest Sprint 11 scope.
Resumely iOS: Fastlane / ASC API key versus manual App Store Connect upload.
ResumeBuilder Web: defer rollout unless Resumely smoke exposes backend blockers.

projects.name: RunSmart iOS
projects.role: Primary premium mobile running coach product.
projects.status: v1.0 build 6 is in App Store review context and frozen. 6.5-inch screenshots are upload-ready, 1.0.1 UX redesign is committed, and Sprint 11 voice-coach planning exists locally.
projects.distributionStatus: In review context; launch distribution waits for Apple outcome
projects.activeStory: Monitor App Store review; preserve frozen v1.0 artifacts; prepare 1.0.1 only after review outcome
projects.lastCompletedStory: 6.5-inch screenshot upload set; 1.0.1 UX redesign spec; Sprint 11 voice coach spec/prompt drafted
projects.nextRecommendedStory: After review outcome, convert Sprint 11 specs into a scoped 1.0.1 implementation plan
projects.lastValidation: GPS QA run 2: 9.10 km 2026-05-30 PASS. 6.5-inch screenshot upload set verified at 1242 x 2688. Prior focused release tests green.
projects.validationState: v1.0 release artifacts frozen; Apple review outcome pending.
blockers: Garmin freshness Story 4 (webhook audit) is backend/human investigation.
Local repo has dirty release/planning files that need triage before 1.0.1 work.
risks: App Store rejection or delay
Mixing 1.0.1 changes into frozen v1.0 release artifacts
Garmin webhook subscription health not yet audited

analyticsStatus.note: Activation events are wired; live funnel values still need production/TestFlight usage.

nextActions: Monitor App Store review and respond to Apple feedback.
Keep v1.0 release artifacts frozen until review outcome is clear.
After review outcome, branch/scope 1.0.1 from Sprint 11 planning artifacts.

projects.name: Resumely iOS
projects.role: Native iOS app for Resumely resume optimization product.
projects.status: Pre-submission after June 1 stabilization. PostHog and PR #36 UX are in; scan wait animation, live design/export/expert fixes, and preview/export stability all passed build/test/smoke. Remaining gates: real-device smoke and ASC upload.
projects.currentPhase: Pre-submission QA and App Store upload
projects.activeStory: Run authenticated real-device smoke, verify PostHog/export coverage, then upload and submit
projects.lastCompletedStory: PostHog integration; PR #36 UX transformation; scan wait animation; live flow/export/expert fixes; preview/export stability
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Run live smoke across optimize/design/expert/preview/export, verify events, upload screenshots/listing, submit
projects.lastValidation: Signed build passed from /tmp DerivedData; full tests passed 53 XCTest + 5 Swift Testing; XcodeBuildMCP launch smoke passed on 2026-06-01.
projects.validationState: Build, tests, analytics, UX, and export fixes passed. Real-device live-account smoke not done.
blockers: No local Fastlane config / ASC API key. App Store upload requires manual setup or portal upload.
Real-device smoke with a live account not completed after June 1 fixes.
Resume Library backend (/api/v1/resumes) not live; mock/disabled path remains.
risks: WKWebView PDF/export fragility on real device
Backend Resume Library not yet live
Swift 6 concurrency strictness
No Hebrew/RTL support

analyticsStatus.note: PostHog integrated before first submission via AnalyticsService with PII guard and event de-dup. Verify live events during authenticated smoke.

nextActions: Run the authenticated device smoke from tasks/session-log.md.
Confirm PostHog Live Events and export coverage from a keyed build.
Upload screenshots/listing in App Store Connect and submit after smoke passes.

taskParse.activeStory: Manual amend on optimized resume complete; next planned story is submit + cover letter from Track
taskParse.lastCompletedStory: Manual amend on optimized resume sections (2026-06-02)
taskParse.nextRecommendedStory: Phase 2 — submit optimized resume + cover letter from Track/Me tab
blockers: backend route must ship before Resume Library can be re-enabled
risks: Swift 6 concurrency strictness
PDF render via WKWebView (fragile on real device)
no Hebrew/RTL support
live backend endpoint gaps now surface real user-visible errors instead of mock fallback content
ExpertSavedReportDetailView's run-id mapping depends on backend returning run IDs in /expert-reports (not yet verified against live backend)
taskParse.lastValidation: Manual amend follow-up: focused `OptimizedResumeViewModelTests` passed 8/8; `xcodebuild build` succeeded on iPhone 17 simulator using `/tmp/resumebuilder-derived`; full `xcodebuild test` passed 63 XCTest + 5 Swift Testing tests; `simctl` install/launch smoke succeeded on booted iPhone 17 with Home screenshot checked (2026-06-02). Default project-local `.derivedData` codesign is blocked by FileProvider/Finder extended attributes, but compile/test pass with signing disabled and signed build passes from `/tmp` DerivedData

projects.name: RunSmart Web
projects.role: Main AI running coach product and source of product logic.
projects.status: Support/backend repo for RunSmart. Commit f677ad7 added the feature-flagged /api/coach/voice-cue endpoint for Sprint 11 voice work. The local checkout is dirty and needs triage before more implementation.
projects.activeStory: B1 voice-cue endpoint exists; inspect dirty state before continuing
projects.lastCompletedStory: feat(B1): /api/coach/voice-cue - TTS coaching cue endpoint with VOICE_COACH_ENABLED flag
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Triage dirty/untracked files and read B1 validation before iOS depends on it.
projects.lastValidation: No latest B1 validation was rerun during this status refresh.
projects.validationState: Needs dirty-tree triage and B1 evidence pull before execution.
blockers: Dirty local tree with many modified/untracked files, including duplicate ` 2` files.
risks: AI coaching correctness and user trust
Training plan logic regressions
Garmin/Apple readiness and sync assumptions
Auth, payments, subscriptions, and monetization
nextActions: Triage modified/untracked files before more web work.
Read B1 endpoint tests/evidence before wiring iOS voice cue service.
Keep web work limited to Sprint 11 backend support unless App Review requires a hotfix.

localEvidence.lastCommit: 2026-06-01 f677ad7 feat(B1): /api/coach/voice-cue — TTS coaching cue endpoint with VOICE_COACH_ENABLED flag

projects.name: ResumeBuilder AI (Web)
projects.role: High-quality resume generation, templates, export, confidence, and conversion.
projects.status: Backend/reference project for Resumely. PDF parse/render-preview fix exists on fix/pdf-parse-xref-error, but rollout shadow enablement remains unchecked and the branch is dirty.
projects.lastCompletedStory: fix(pdf-parse): fix xref error in PDF parse and render-preview pipeline
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Defer unless Resumely smoke exposes backend blockers; otherwise complete rollout shadow enablement.
projects.lastValidation: No contracts or rollout checks rerun during this status refresh.
projects.validationState: Needs branch cleanup and rollout validation before production activation.
risks: Low-quality AI output
Broken PDF/export formatting
Templates that look good but parse poorly
Hebrew/English direction bugs
nextActions: Leave parked unless Resumely smoke exposes backend parse/render issues.
Complete rollout shadow enablement and telemetry monitoring before production activation.
Keep the 90-day GTM plan deferred until App Store submission creates a real mobile CTA.

projects.name: Atlas
projects.role: Cross-project coordination for tasks, context, specs, QA, workflows, and agents.
projects.status: Future orchestration concept. Keep proving the manual workflow through Agentic OS dashboards before automating.
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Keep manual workflow lightweight; automate only after repeated patterns are proven.
projects.lastValidation: Concept only; no repo path confirmed.
projects.validationState: Concept only; no repo path confirmed.
blockers: Manual orchestration workflow not yet proven enough to automate.
risks: Replacing local project truth with stale global summaries
Loading too much context
Over-centralizing secrets, docs, or decisions
Creating fake certainty across repos
nextActions: Use the Global Agentic OS dashboard as a manual coordination layer.
Keep local project repos as source of truth.
Record repeatable workflows before building Atlas automation.

agentQueue.task: Run Resumely iOS live-device smoke, then prepare ASC upload.
agentQueue.whenToUse: Use when the next move touches App Store readiness, screenshots, smoke QA, or submission gates.
agentQueue.starter: Act as the Release Manager for Resumely iOS. Read PROJECT-STATUS.md and the ResumeBuilder iOS tasks/session-log.md. Produce the exact smoke checklist, expected evidence, and ASC upload sequence. Do not submit or upload without explicit approval.

agentQueue.task: Resolve the next portfolio decision and keep focus tight.
agentQueue.whenToUse: Use when there are competing next moves across RunSmart, Resumely, distribution, and backend support.
agentQueue.starter: Act as CEO OS. Read dashboard/status.json and executive-os/EXECUTIVE-DASHBOARD.md. Pick the one highest-leverage decision, recommend an option, state cost of delay, and list the single next action.

agentQueue.task: Turn the current Action Board into one reviewable work packet.
agentQueue.whenToUse: Use when you want the next agent task delegated without losing source context.
agentQueue.starter: Act as Director. Read dashboard/status.json, especially priorityBoard, projectHealth, and agentQueue. Create one decision-complete task packet for the recommended agent. Include goal, files to read, acceptance criteria, checks, and what not to touch.

agentQueue.task: Verify dashboard or product readiness with evidence.
agentQueue.whenToUse: Use before calling a status, UI, or release task done.
agentQueue.starter: Act as QA. Read GLOBAL-QA-RULES.md and dashboard/status.json. Build a focused QA checklist for the target change, run the available checks, and report pass/fail with evidence and missing validation.

projectPrompts.nextAction: Run a short simulator UI smoke through each root tab after the existing release branch is ready for interactive QA
projectPrompts.copyPrompt: Act as iOS Release / Product Engineer for RunSmart iOS. First read the repo AGENTS.md if it exists, then read the listed source files: tasks/MEMORY.md, tasks/todo.md, tasks/session-log.md, docs/specs/README.md. Current state: App Store submission sprint (Build 6). Next action: Run a short simulator UI smoke through each root tab after the existing release branch is ready for interactive QA. Known blockers: Apple review outcome is external.; Garmin freshness Story 4 (webhook audit) is backend/human investigation.; Local repo has dirty release/planning files that need triage before 1.0.1 work.. Deliver one progress-making work packet only: objective, files to inspect, exact implementation or QA steps, acceptance criteria, checks to run, and what must not be touched. Do not deploy, submit, email, bill, migrate, or change production services without explicit approval.
